question: Last trader wins, linear growth
textDescription:
This question resolves to the position of the trader who holds the largest singular trade if after 24 hours this record has not been beaten.

Limit orders don't count, only Quick orders.

This is not "Holders" this is previous trades as shown in "Trades"

Example:

John: 100 Mana Yes

Jeff: 101 Mana No (5 hours later)

John: 300 Mana Yes (10 hours later)

(No single trade higher than 300 mana in 24 hours)

Resolves to the position of John, which in this case is Yes.

Update 2026-05-25 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): The close date extends indefinitely as long as the record keeps getting broken.
newsShortReason: No significant evidence indicates that a single trader's position will remain unchallenged for 24 hours.
